sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الشِّعْرُ الْعَرَبِيُّ فَنّاً جَمِيلاً جِدّاً.
sentences.translation: Arapska poezija se smatra veoma lijepom umjetnošću.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic poetry is considered a very beautiful art.

sentences.translation: Pjesnik koristi riječi kako bi opisao osjećanja.
sentences.translationEn: The poet uses words to describe feelings.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْقَدِيمِ، كَانَ النَّاسُ يَحْفَظُونَ الْقَصَائِدَ الطَّوِيلَةَ.
sentences.translation: U prošlosti su ljudi pamtili duge pjesme.
sentences.translationEn: In the past, people used to memorize long poems.

sentences.arabic: الْيَوْمَ، نَقْرَأُ الشِّعْرَ لِنَفْهَمَ جَمَالَ اللُّغَةِ.
sentences.translation: Danas čitamo poeziju da bismo razumjeli ljepotu jezika.
sentences.translationEn: Today, we read poetry to understand the beauty of the language.

sentences.arabic: الشِّعْرُ يُعَبِّرُ عَنِ الْحُبِّ لِلْوَطَنِ وَالطَّبِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Poezija izražava ljubav prema domovini i prirodi.
sentences.translationEn: Poetry expresses love for the homeland and nature.
